error_signature: Workflow is not active and cannot be executed
title: Inactive subflow causes execution error
symptom: When running the main workflow, an error occurs stating 'Workflow is not active and cannot be executed'. This prevents the main workflow from executing properly.
not_this_if: All subflows are published and active
root_cause: Subflows in n8n must be published to be executed. If a subflow is not published, it remains inactive and cannot be called from another workflow, leading to execution errors.
fix_steps: Open Subflow A in the n8n editor
Click the Publish button to activate it
Open Subflow B in the n8n editor
Click the Publish button to activate it
Try running the Main workflow again
agent_instruction: Publish both Subflow A and Subflow B to resolve the execution error.
